docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,187.38 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOGANNAM, MARYO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $105.00 SERVED APR-13-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOGANNAM, MARYO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2025 VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARYO MOGANNAM IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOGANNAM, MARYO $1,187.38 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,292.38 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PAUL SARMIENTO FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
